name: Lemon Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour once, then sift together baking powder and salt.
2. Add lemon rind to butter and cream thoroughly until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating after each addition until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
5. Alternately add flour with the combined lemon juice and water, beating after each addition until smooth.
6. Bake in two greased 9-inch layer pans in a moderate oven (375°F) for 20 minutes, or until done.
7. Spread Lemon Frosting between layers and on top and sides of cake.
